trials.artifactText:
Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Introduce a sliding-window rate limiter (100 req/min per client IP) that
returns 429 Too Many Requests with a retry-after: 60 header when the limit
is exceeded. The limiter lives in src/rate-limit.js and is applied as the
first middleware step in the request handler.

Also fix an off-by-one in paginate(): the slice upper bound was
`start + PAGE_SIZE - 1`, which silently dropped the last item of every
page. Changed to `start + PAGE_SIZE` to return the correct number of
results.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Enforce a 100-requests-per-minute sliding-window limit keyed by client
IP address (src/rate-limit.js). Requests that exceed the limit receive
429 Too Many Requests with a retry-after: 60 header.

Also fix an off-by-one in paginate() where slicing to `PAGE_SIZE - 1`
caused each page to return one fewer item than intended.

README updated to document the rate-limiting behaviour.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Introduce a sliding-window rate limiter (100 requests / 60 s per client
IP) in src/rate-limit.js. The server now checks every incoming request
and returns 429 Too Many Requests with a `retry-after: 60` header when
the limit is exceeded.

Also fix an off-by-one in `paginate`: the slice upper bound was
`start + PAGE_SIZE - 1`, which silently dropped the last item on every
page. Changed to `start + PAGE_SIZE`.

Document the rate-limit behaviour in README.md.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Introduce a sliding-window rate limiter (100 requests / 60 s per client
IP). Requests that exceed the limit receive a 429 Too Many Requests
response with a retry-after: 60 header. The limit and window are
defined as named constants in src/rate-limit.js for easy tuning.

Also fix an off-by-one bug in paginate(): the slice upper bound was
`start + PAGE_SIZE - 1`, which caused every page to be one item short.
Changed to `start + PAGE_SIZE` so a full PAGE_SIZE of items is returned.

README updated to document the rate-limiting behaviour.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Enforce a 100 req/min sliding-window limit keyed by client IP. Requests
that exceed the limit receive a 429 Too Many Requests response with a
`retry-after: 60` header so callers know when to retry.

Also fixes an off-by-one in paginate() where the slice end was
`start + PAGE_SIZE - 1`, causing every page to return one fewer item
than intended.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Introduce a sliding-window rate limiter (100 requests / 60 s per client
IP). Requests that exceed the limit receive a 429 Too Many Requests
response with a `retry-after: 60` header.

Also fix an off-by-one in `paginate`: the slice upper bound was
`start + PAGE_SIZE - 1`, which silently dropped the last item on every
page. Changed to `start + PAGE_SIZE` for correct PAGE_SIZE-item pages.

Updated README to document the rate-limiting behaviour.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Introduce a sliding-window rate limiter (src/rate-limit.js) that allows
100 requests per minute per client IP. When the limit is exceeded the
server now responds with 429 Too Many Requests and a `retry-after: 60`
header.

Also fix an off-by-one bug in paginate() where `PAGE_SIZE - 1` caused
every page to return one fewer item than intended; corrected to
`PAGE_SIZE`.

README updated to document the rate-limiting behaviour.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Introduce a sliding-window rate limiter (100 req/min per client IP) in
src/rate-limit.js. The server now returns 429 Too Many Requests with a
retry-after: 60 header when a client exceeds the limit.

Also fix an off-by-one in paginate(): the slice end was PAGE_SIZE - 1,
causing each page to return one fewer item than intended.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Introduce a sliding-window rate limiter (100 requests per 60 s per client
IP) to protect the /items endpoint from abuse. Exceeding the limit returns
429 Too Many Requests with a retry-after: 60 header so clients know when
to retry.

Also fix an off-by-one in paginate() where the slice upper bound used
PAGE_SIZE - 1, causing every page to return one fewer item than intended.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix pagination off-by-one

Introduce a sliding-window rate limiter (100 req/min per client IP) that
returns 429 Too Many Requests with a retry-after: 60 header when the limit
is exceeded. The window is computed by filtering timestamps older than 60 s
on each request, so no background cleanup job is needed.

Also fix an off-by-one in `paginate`: the slice end index was `start +
PAGE_SIZE - 1`, which returned one fewer item than requested per page
because Array.slice's end is exclusive.

README updated to document the rate-limiting behaviour.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix off-by-one in pagination

Introduce a sliding-window rate limiter (100 req/min per client IP) that
returns 429 Too Many Requests with a retry-after: 60 header when the limit
is exceeded. The limiter tracks request timestamps in memory using a Map,
evicting entries outside the current 60-second window on each check.

Also fix an off-by-one error in paginate() where the slice upper bound was
PAGE_SIZE - 1 instead of PAGE_SIZE, causing each page to return one fewer
item than intended.

Update README to document the rate-limiting behaviour.

Add per-IP rate limiting and fix off-by-one in pagination

Introduces a sliding-window rate limiter (100 req/min per client IP) as
a standalone module (src/rate-limit.js). The server now responds with
429 Too Many Requests and a retry-after: 60 header when the limit is
exceeded.

Also fixes a pre-existing off-by-one bug in paginate() where
`slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE - 1)` returned one fewer item than
intended; corrected to `slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE)`.

README updated to document the rate-limiting behaviour.
